def positive_same_buffer_or_prefix_reencoded_each_iteration():
    rule_id = "same_buffer_or_prefix_reencoded_each_iteration"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that re-encode identical prefixes or headers on each iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
